education.title: M.S. in Information
education.org: University of Michigan, Ann Arbor · School of Information
education.description: Completed the master’s phase in Ann Arbor. Arrived through the UM–SJTU Joint Institute 3+2 dual-degree pathway with Shanghai Jiao Tong University.

education.title: B.S. in Electronic & Computer Engineering
education.org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University · UM–SJTU Joint Institute (Shanghai)
education.description: Undergraduate studies at the Joint Institute (JI), covering the Shanghai segment of the 3+2 program: three years toward the bachelor’s before the master’s in Ann Arbor.

work.title: Senior Web Front-End Engineer
work.org: SenseTime · LLM Business Unit — Financial Services · Shanghai
work.description:
Led end-to-end delivery of front-office and mid-office for large-model agent services using Python FastAPI and Vue 3. Shipped a contract-review AI agent from zero to production in three weeks, automating core AI business workflows.

Scaled an AI-native development practice with tools such as Cursor, cutting repetitive coding effort by about 80% and achieving 90%+ AI-generated new code on the project, improving velocity and quality.

Owned H5 front end for a public-cloud face-verification product on a JS + WebAssembly architecture, and independently built both the C++ SDK and browser JS layers: hardened image-signature verification in the SDK, and implemented capture plus real-time rendering in JS/Vue 3 for 95%+ compatibility across mobile Chrome, Safari, and WeChat.

Contributed to the LLM mid-platform front end, designing and optimizing tree data for 20,000+ people, 5,000+ org units, and 10 hierarchy levels, keeping interaction and render under one second; supported two standard releases and two custom deployments.

Delivered a financial-grade private-cloud verification service from POC to scale on Docker and Kubernetes, adapting to domestic IT innovation stacks (Kunpeng, openEuler), authoring 10+ deployment scripts for containerization and reducing rollout from days to about four hours.

Led multimodal LLM research analysis: benchmarked competitors and local models in Python, compared classical OCR with multimodal LLMs across scenarios, and fed key samples back to research to improve the foundation model.

work.title: Web Front-End Engineer
work.org: SenseTime · Smart City & Integrated Business · Shanghai
work.description:
Built the front end for a large Lingang urban-management admin system on Vue 2 and Element UI, covering core business and data dashboards. Refactored and abstracted components for maintainability and stability; fixed memory leaks in the dashboard player that caused crashes, keeping the system reliable long term.

Worked on a chip training platform UI in React, delivering complex model data-labeling flows for the full AI labeling pipeline with high precision and flexibility.

Independently shipped the SRE console for a cloud management platform: deploy, upgrade, rollback, and monitoring in one place, cutting manual ops and improving delivery efficiency.
